headlines.title: American passengers aboard hantavirus-hit cruise ship will quarantine in Nebraska, CDC says
headlines.description: A team from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention will meet American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak, an agency official confirmed to NBC News.“CDC is sending a team to the Canary Islands to meet the Americans on board the Dutch cruise ship,” the CDC official said.

headlines.title: Evidence of possible human remains found in search of property linked to Kristin Smart case
headlines.description: Authorities investigating the 1996 disappearance and murder of California college student Kristin Smart say soil tests indicate that human remains may be or may have been on a property linked to the case.

headlines.title: Police continue search and testing at property linked to Kristin Smart
headlines.description: Authorities investigating a property in connection with the disappearance and murder of California college student Kristin Smart have so far not discovered her remains, but the search and testing is ongoing. NBC News' Steve Patterson breaks down what could be spurring the movement in the 1996 case.

headlines.title: U.S. economy adds 115,000 jobs in April, unemployment rate at 4.3%
headlines.description: The U.S. economy added 115,000 jobs in April, as the unemployment rate came in at 4.3%. NBC News' Allie Canal and Caleb Silver, editor-in-chief at Investopedia, report on the gains in the job market despite the ongoing tensions with Iran.

headlines.title: Controversy surrounding data center approval connected to Shark Tank's Kevin O'Leary
headlines.description: A Kevin O’Leary-backed data center is moving forward after a local vote in Box Elder County, Utah, despite community protests. NBC News’ Shaq Brewster reports.

headlines.title: Doctor who previously worked on cruise ship now experiencing hantavirus outbreak speaks out
headlines.description: NBC News' Tom Llamas talks to Dr. Martin Kriz, who previously worked on the cruise ship that now has an outbreak of hantavirus, about the health protocols and equipment on board.

headlines.title: Interactive: How common is your first name? Your last name?
headlines.description: New first name and last name data shows which names in the U.S. are the most popular and which aren’t anymore.

headlines.title: Allyson Felix wants to challenge what aging in sports is supposed to look like
headlines.description: When American sprinter Allyson Felix retired in 2022, she didn’t have anything left to prove.

headlines.title: A new federal bill aims to protect pregnant women held in prisons and jails
headlines.description: The proposed legislation follows an investigation by Bloomberg Law and NBC News that found mistreatment of pregnant women in local jails.

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: The best Korean hair care products for glossy, healthy hair
headlines.description: We consulted dermatologists for the best Korean hair care shampoos, conditioners, hair treatments and more, including what to look for when buying.

headlines.title: It’s the last weekend to shop Amazon’s Summer Beauty Event deals
headlines.description: Shop the best Amazon Summer Beauty Event deals on skin care, hair tools and makeup from Medicube, Innisfree, Dyson and more.
